sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 캐터필러는 2025년 4분기 매출 191억 달러로 분기 기준 사상 최대 실적을 기록하며 한 해를 마무리했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 4분기 매출 191억 달러를 달성하며 분기 기준 사상 최대 매출을 기록했습니다.
2025년 연간 117억 달러의 영업 현금흐름을 창출하고, 주주에게 79억 달러를 배당 및 자사주 매입으로 환원했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 최종 사용자 대상 장비 판매 증가에 힘입어 2025년 연간 매출이 전년 대비 4% 증가한 676억 달러를 기록했습니다.
기록적인 수주 잔고를 바탕으로 2026년에도 강력한 모멘텀을 이어갈 것으로 전망했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 4분기 매출은 191억 달러로 전년 동기 162억 달러 대비 18% 증가했습니다.
2025년 4분기 조정 주당순이익(EPS)은 5.16달러로 전년 동기 5.14달러 대비 소폭 상승했습니다.
2025년 말 기준 기업 현금 보유액은 100억 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 기록적인 수주 잔고가 향후 분기 매출 성장세로 어떻게 전환되는지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 cat_exx991x4qx2025xearning.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Caterpillar Inc. 4Q 2025 Earnings Release FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Caterpillar Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results ● Fourth-quarter 2025 sales and revenues were $19.1 billion; full-year sales and revenues were $67.6 billion ● Fourth-quarter 2025 profit per share of $5.12; adjusted profit per share of $5.16 ● Full-year profit per share of $18.81; adjusted profit per share of $19.06 ● Strong full-year enterprise operating cash flow of $11.7 billion; ended 2025 with $10.0 billion of enterprise cash ● Deployed $7.9 billion of cash for share repurchases and dividends in 2025 Fourth Quarter Full Yea  Normalized numeric aliases: $19.1 billion = 191억 달러; $67.6 billion = 676억 달러; $11.7 billion = 117억 달러; $10.0 billion = 100억 달러; $7.9 billion = 79억 달러; $19.1 = 19.1달러; $67.6 = 67.6달러; $5.12 = 5.12달러; $18.81 = 18.81달러; $16.2 = 16.2달러; $21.90 = 21.90달러; $64.8 = 64.8달러; $5.78 = 5.78달러; $22.05 = 22.05달러; $5.14 = 5.14달러.

ciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP financial measures in the appendix on pages 13 to 15. IRVING, Texas, Jan. 29, 2026 – Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) announced fourth-quarter and full-year results for 2025. “Our centennial year marked a significant milestone, underscored by the highest full-year sales and revenues in Caterpillar’s history and a single-quarter record of $19.1 billion,” said Caterpillar CEO Joe Creed. “These results demonstrate the strength of our end markets and our disciplined execution. With a record backlog, we enter the new year with strong momentum and a continued focus on delivering long-term value for our customers and shareholders.” Sales and revenues for the fourth quarter of 2025 were $19.1 billion, an 18% increase compared with $16.2 billion in the fourth quarter of 2024. Operating profit margin was 13.9 % for the fourth quarter of 2025, compared with 18.0  Normalized numeric aliases: $19.1 billion = 191억 달러; $16.2 billion = 162억 달러; $19.1 = 19.1달러; $16.2 = 16.2달러.

ourth quarter of 2024. Adjusted operating profit margin was 15.6% for the fourth quarter of 2025, compared with 18.3% for the fourth quarter of 2024. Fourth-quarter 2025 profit per share was $5.12, compared with $5.78 profit per share in the fourth quarter of 2024. Adjusted profit per share in the fourth quarter of 2025 was $5.16, compared with fourth-quarter 2024 adjusted profit per share of $5.14. Full-year sales and revenues in 2025 were $67.6 billion, up 4% compared with $64.8 billion in 2024. The increase reflected higher sales volume of $3.4 billion, partially offset by unfavorable price realization of $0.8 billion. Higher sales volume was primarily driven by higher sales of equipment to end users. Operating profit mar  Normalized numeric aliases: $67.6 billion = 676억 달러; $64.8 billion = 648억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $0.8 billion = 8억 달러; $5.12 = 5.12달러; $5.78 = 5.78달러; $5.16 = 5.16달러; $5.14 = 5.14달러; $64.8 = 64.8달러; $67.6 = 67.6달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러; $0.8 = 0.8달러; $18.81 = 18.81달러.

hare in 2025, compared with profit of $22.05 per share in 2024. Adjusted profit per share in 2025 was $19.06, compared with adjusted profit per share of $21.90 in 2024. (more) 2 In 2025 and 2024, adjusted operating profit margin excluded restructuring costs. 2025 and 2024 adjusted profit per share excluded restructuring costs and mark-to-market gains for remeasurement of pension and other postemployment benefit (OPEB) plans. In 2024, adjusted profit per share also excluded a discrete tax benefit for a tax law change related to currency translation. Please see a reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP financial measures in the appendix on pages 13 to 15.
